# EULA Draft

This is a working draft and should be reviewed before publication.

## Product

BIM Command Center for Revit

## Publisher

LUA BIM LABS

## License

The product is licensed, not sold. A valid Autodesk App Store subscription or trial entitlement is required to use the product.

## Permitted Use

Users may install and use the product with supported Autodesk Revit versions according to the purchased subscription, trial or enterprise agreement.

## Restrictions

Users may not:

- Reverse engineer or decompile the product except where permitted by law.
- Share subscription access outside the licensed user or organization.
- Remove licensing or entitlement checks.
- Redistribute the installer or product files outside authorized deployment channels.

## Data

The first commercial release is intended to run core Revit commands locally. Autodesk App Store entitlement verification requires network access and the Autodesk login user identifier provided by Revit.

## No Warranty

The product is provided as a professional productivity tool. Users are responsible for validating output before using it in production deliverables, construction documents, procurement or fabrication.

## Limitation Of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, LUA BIM LABS is not liable for indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from use of the product.

## Support

Support is provided by email according to the published support policy.

Support email: `support@your-domain.example`
